name: James, E. Bradley

motto: “Bill can teach 'Old Sleuth' how to cold trail.”

name: Robert, M. Cherry
motto: “What does Bob Cherry think about it?”

motto: "He loves me, he loves me not, my Pride and Joy."

name: Conley, George Dewey
motto: "The M. E. who would blow up Engine Hall."

name: Ellison, H. F.
motto: "Soon Fred will be farming for two."

name: Evatt, Estella
motto: "The hand that follows intellect must achieve."
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1919-2.pdf_页面_02.png

name: Gilliam, Eleanor R.
motto: "A sunny face, contented mind, With mirth and wisdom all combined."
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1919-2.pdf_页面_02.png

name: Gollaher, Pearl Gladys
motto: "Terrible spendthrift—of her tongue."
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1919-2.pdf_页面_02.png

name: Grabiel, Ruth R.
motto: "With stately mien and grace, Fair of form and fair of face."

name: Greer, Irving M.
motto: "Likes to have his picture made in uniform because he looks so much better."

name: Hay, Walker C.
motto: "He tears up watches to see the wheels go round."
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1919-2.pdf_页面_03.png

name: Hays, L. Brooks
motto: "Nothing left to do but graduate, get married and grow old."
clubs: Editor in Chief of the Razorback '17-'18
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1919-2.pdf_页面_03.png

name: Henderson, E. Lee
motto: "Lee carries his test tube even to choir practice."
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1919-2.pdf_页面_03.png

name: Hendricks, Agnes Belle
motto: "Grace and useful in all she does, Blessing and blessed wherever she goes."
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1919-2.pdf_页面_03.png

name: Hilton, Amelia D.
motto: "Sweet as the primrose peeps beneath the thorn, Her modest looks a cottage might adorn."

name: Hodges, Bessie Pearl
motto: "The practical little pie-maker of the Practice Cottage."

name: Johnson, Madge
motto: "Measures, not men, have been my mark."

name: Kerr, Catherine
motto: "Her life has many a hope and aim."
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1919-2.pdf_页面_04.png

name: Knott, John Homer
motto: "Vergil's Little Brother. Girls sure do bother him."
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1919-2.pdf_页面_04.png

name: Logan, Robert R.
motto: "Say, Bess, say what you want to about me, but spare 'Wags.' He ain't no houn'."

name: Lucas, Henry Alexander
motto: "Hen never did get to a Senior meeting."

motto: "Found peace in love's unselfishness."

motto: "Wind Mac up and have Windy Mac."

name: Miller, Alma
motto: "Patience to do things is a virtue very few possess."

motto: "The cutest, fattest, little sailor man."

name: Neely, Virginia
motto: "A man to practice on, with the theories I have learned."

name: Prather, Marian
motto: "A creature not too bright nor good for human nature's daily food."

name: Pratt, Evangeline
motto: "She's that fine congenial spirit, my friend."

name: Ragsdale, John Gails

name: Ross, Una Mae
motto: "Thy sweet expressions seem like language uttered in a dream!"

motto: "Bob went to Arkansas College once but repented."

motto: "Modest girl; most studious girl." "Deep sighted in intelligence."

motto: "One of these old corn fed farmers."

motto: "Happy in poverty, contented with her 'Rags'."

motto: "How often does he hear from Ruth?"

motto: "A brave soldier sticks close to his Cannon."

motto: "Gives Dr. Harding information on Astronomy."

name: Anderson, Lance Dewey
motto: "A staunch old bachelor through school and army."

name: Douglas, W. S.

name: Taylor, Beloit
motto: "What do you say?" "Most forgot he wanted to graduate."

name: Barrett, Joe
description: Has the keenest picture (frame) in Hill Hall.

name: Barrett, Lois
description: If talking pleases teacher, Lois has made a decided hit.

name: Baskin, Clara
description: Ask Clara about the most exciting part of the S. A. T. C.

name: Bennett, Lucy
description: One of the crooks of the freshmen election.

name: Brazil, Ernest
description: Ernest is destined to become a football star.
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1919-2.pdf_页面_09.png

name: Brown, Frieda
description: It's the little things in life that count.
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1919-2.pdf_页面_09.png

name: Carroll, Mayme
description: If silence were music, Mayme would be a whole brass band.
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1919-2.pdf_页面_09.png

name: Chotard, Elizabeth
description: Never do for yourself what you can get others to do for you.
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1919-2.pdf_页面_09.png

name: Clark, R. H.
description: Hasn't he a wonderful physique?
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1919-2.pdf_页面_09.png

name: Cooper, R. A.
description: "Believe me, that guy Cooper was hard on us freshmen!"

name: Coker, Edith
description: She is too quiet to say much about.

name: Cowan, Bohart
motto: "Give it to him, boys, we got ours."
description: A regular old school "Gray Hall Saint."

name: Cox, J. E.
description: A Geology shark, and—gee, them eyes!
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1919-2.pdf_页面_10.png

name: Cox, Pearl
description: No kin to Jesse. Her ambition tends toward writing feature stories.
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1919-2.pdf_页面_10.png

name: Crockett, Elizabeth
description: All other things in vain we've tried, So give her a boy and she's satisfied.
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1919-2.pdf_页面_10.png

name: Dudley, B.
description: An engineer whose majors are A's and whose minors are B's.
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1919-2.pdf_页面_10.png

name: Evans, Hugh
description: "Say, fellers, I'm an honest to Gawd second lieutenant. Look at me."

name: Forrester, Charlye
description: "Oh, say kid, Sode's here!"
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1919-2.pdf_页面_10.png

name: Gatewood, E. M.
description: He was on the refreshment committee for the Junior dance. He went to Monette, but was robbed on the way back.
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1919-2.pdf_页面_10.png

name: Gold, Paul
description: "Say, Verda, who is that good-looking kid who stays at the girls' dorm so much?"
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1919-2.pdf_页面_10.png

name: Gregg, Carolyn
description: She's an all round girl and a student.
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1919-2.pdf_页面_11.png

name: Harrison, Clyrene
motto: "Far be it from me to be sarcastic."
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1919-2.pdf_页面_11.png

name: Hannah, Paul
motto: "If I ever get out of this navy, I'll never join another."
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1919-2.pdf_页面_11.png

name: Harding, H. H.
description: The registrar's little brother. He used to visit Hill Hall quite frequently. I wonder why?
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1919-2.pdf_页面_11.png

name: Hart, Gertrude
description: The library's only heart.
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1919-2.pdf_页面_11.png

name: Hays, Ralph
description: The boy who carries our stick reports to the office.
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1919-2.pdf_页面_11.png

name: Hollabaugh, Earnest
motto: "I'm little, but I'm loud, lookout for me."
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1919-2.pdf_页面_11.png

name: Harrod, L. W.
motto: "I can't see why everyone doesn't like sociology."
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1919-2.pdf_页面_11.png

name: Hassell, Guthrie
description: Has a B. M. degree, but that doesn't mean he's a bad man.

name: Heagner, John
description: Left school for something more to his liking.
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1919-2.pdf_页面_11.png

name: Hood, Edna
description: How does it seem to be on campus, Edna? Does it interfere with your dates?

name: Simon, Neil
description: He has gone from here never to return. He doesn't know what he's missing.
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1919-2.pdf_页面_12.png

name: Irby, Anne
description: Experienced Home Ec. Takes on weight readily.
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1919-2.pdf_页面_12.png

name: Irby, Peter
description: Not loud especially, but extremely fond of "Red."
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1919-2.pdf_页面_12.png

name: Knight, William
description: He deserves a place in our hall of fame. He is not with us now.
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1919-2.pdf_页面_12.png

name: Knoch, Lester
description: that lots of people like to have around.
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1919-2.pdf_页面_12.png

name: Lawson, E. H.
description: "Who is that good-looking boy in the corner eating with a spoon?" Hugh loves a new one every week. Next!
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1919-2.pdf_页面_12.png

name: Leiper, Hugh
description: The Wear-ever guy. Guaranteed to wear one week-end. Try him, girls.
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1919-2.pdf_页面_12.png

name: Locke, Archibald
description: Looks well in leather leggings. "Archie will never be bald."
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1919-2.pdf_页面_12.png

name: Maddox, Lila Mae
description: We don't know why she left. There may be several reasons.
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1919-2.pdf_页面_12.png

name: Markwell, K. W.
description: Gone but not forgotten. May return to us next year.
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1919-2.pdf_页面_13.png

name: Massengale, Lura
description: If being happy were a crime, she would get a life sentence.
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1919-2.pdf_页面_13.png

name: Matthews, Verda Park
description: Charming grace, a ready smile—that is enough.
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1919-2.pdf_页面_13.png

name: McDonnell, Susie
description: Slow but sure.
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1919-2.pdf_页面_13.png

name: McKennon, Joe
description: To be found in the joke department. One of Dr. Pickel's sharks.
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1919-2.pdf_页面_13.png

name: Miller, Fanita
description: She would hurry but is afraid she couldn't stop.
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1919-2.pdf_页面_13.png

name: Mulrennin, Cass
motto: "Oh, for a ride in that good-looking car with that good-looking boy!"
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1919-2.pdf_页面_13.png

name: Newman, Stanley
motto: "I wish I could dance my life away."
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1919-2.pdf_页面_13.png

name: Meinmier, George
description: Does he dance, does he prance, does he do a lot of things you can't resist? Well, does he?

name: Oliver, W. L.
description: A persistent consistent student.
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1919-2.pdf_页面_13.png

name: Moffitt, James
description: Superintendent of Rose Hill Mission. Intends to continue the work.

name: O'Kelley, J. F.
motto: "but time is no item."
description: Dignity well becomes a second lieutenant. Boys starved while he was announcing Agri Club meeting.

name: Parker, Donald
clubs: Sergeant, Co. E, S. A. T. C.
description: Well liked by his men.
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1919-2.pdf_页面_14.png

name: Polk, Joe T.
description: He's been taking early morning constitutionals especially for an eight o'clock class.
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1919-2.pdf_页面_14.png

name: Ptak, James
description: That tall, high, pretty good-looking, rather slim boy. A good dancer.
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1919-2.pdf_页面_14.png

name: Sanderson, Sibyl
description: Sibyl stars in gym.
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1919-2.pdf_页面_14.png

name: Sellars, Mary Dale
description: Her eyes betray her. She thinks too much.
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1919-2.pdf_页面_14.png

name: Simpson, Augusta
description: She intends to put the Hamburger in Hamburg.
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1919-2.pdf_页面_14.png

name: Shinn, Darell
motto: "Let's see. I was with Blythe last night. Yes, I'd better call Bess to-night."
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1919-2.pdf_页面_14.png

name: Slaughter, Bernice
motto: "Well, gee whiz, kid, I'm an onion. That's me all over, Mabel."

name: Steinberg, Harry
description: A bundle of fun from Clay county.

name: Smith, L. P.
description: O-oO-oo-oo Pig! RAZORBACK!
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1919-2.pdf_页面_15.png

name: Towler, H. S.
description: Speight has some friends in Fayetteville of whom no one knows.
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1919-2.pdf_页面_15.png

name: Turner, B. B.
description: An unfortunate—or should we say fortunate—friend.
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1919-2.pdf_页面_15.png

name: Vinson, Clyde
description: He is back again after a short vacation.
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1919-2.pdf_页面_15.png

name: Walker, Byrnes
description: Left the University by coercive reasoning.
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1919-2.pdf_页面_15.png

name: Wallace, Albert
description: Main stay of University band. Ben's right hand man.
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1919-2.pdf_页面_15.png

name: Wilson, Louise
description: She wasn't born to be lonesome.
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1919-2.pdf_页面_15.png

name: Winkleman, Ben
motto: "Yaka Hula Hicka Doola, Yaka Hula Hicka Doo."

name: Williams, Forrest
description: Ask Forrest about the Biology trip. Have you heard him play the cornet?
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1919-2.pdf_页面_15.png

name: Lee, Bill
motto: "Dear little Billy don't you cry, You'll be an Agri prof by and by."
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1919-2.pdf_页面_16.png

name: Newman, Grace
motto: "I don't agree with you."
description: Woe be unto man if she ever goes suffragette. Writes whole volumes to John.
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1919-2.pdf_页面_16.png

name: Woodward, F. S.
motto: "Let's go to the show to-night. They're having—"
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1919-2.pdf_页面_16.png

name: Adams, Quincy
motto: "He won't let the ladies interfere with his college studies."
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1919-2.pdf_页面_17.png

name: Arnold, David B.
motto: "President of a Hill Hall Corporation."

name: Askew, Ben
motto: "Wants to teach a class in Physics."
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1919-2.pdf_页面_17.png

name: Barton, Louise
motto: "Wonder why all her hats turn up in front."
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1919-2.pdf_页面_17.png

name: Beasley, George
motto: "Love makes the world go round."

name: Blevins, Eloise
motto: "All love is sweet, given or returned."

name: Black, Clint
motto: "Shoots 'em straight across the plate."

name: Brickey, Cula
motto: "Have you noticed her dimples?"
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1919-2.pdf_页面_17.png

name: Bowers, Eddie
motto: "A player piano all by himself."
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1919-2.pdf_页面_17.png

name: Cain, Agnes
motto: "I am a Jazz Baby."
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1919-2.pdf_页面_17.png

name: Carl, Beula
motto: "Here's to the girl who can cook a good dinner."
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1919-2.pdf_页面_17.png

name: Cavett, Melita
motto: "Idleness is an appendix to nobility."
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1919-2.pdf_页面_17.png

name: Clark, Edna
motto: "When she left it seemed like the ceasing of exquisite music."

name: Cox, Clem
motto: "Fur" Be (a) Furr.

name: Colbert, James
motto: "How can I tell when a girl loves me?"

name: Crozier, Cornelia
motto: "Fain would I climb, yet fear I to fall."

name: Crump, Helen
motto: "They laugh that win."

name: Dante, Jack
motto: "A prosperous looking guy."

description: Makes a good "Dr. Harding."

name: Gillespie, Louise
description: Her very frowns are fairer far than smiles of other maidens are.

description: The mildest manners and the gentlest heart.
